description: grendha's high quality sandals capture the sultry summer's essence, the fuss-free design and flirty adornments give a street-chic vibe. Showcase these flats with cropped pants and a pastel hued fitted shirt.UpperThong style straps with a bow and flower detail for styleJet black Upperand black currant purple footbedSmooth footbed with printed brandingOutsoleShort, stacked heelGrooves all overSandal careWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust
